title: nicotiana × atkinsiana
intro: Nicotiana × atkinsiana, also known as the large flower tobacco or jimsonweed, is a plant species in the nightshade family that has been used for medicinal and ritual purposes for centuries. The plant contains scopolamine and hyoscyamine, alkaloids with medicinal properties that have been used to treat various health conditions, including pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Nicotiana × atkinsiana include its ability to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation, as well as its use as a natural antispasmodic to alleviate muscle cramps and spasms. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, but it is essential to use caution and follow proper dosing guidelines due to its potential toxicity.
